# Examples · Security Scan

> Good-vs-bad code snippets matching each rule this skill emits.

This page is the human-readable supplement to
[`rules-catalog.md`](rules-catalog.md). For each rule the skill flags,
showing the bad form, the suggested fix, and the cited reference.

## Format

```text
### <rule_id>
Reference: <Standard label · URL>

❌ Bad
    <minimal reproducing snippet>

✅ Good
    <suggested replacement>

Why it matters
    <one-line consequence>
```

## Rules
_Populate as the rule catalog grows. The pattern entries in
[`../../_shared/patterns.py`](../../_shared/patterns.py) carry the
authoritative text; this file mirrors them with executable examples._
